title: Sqlitelogictest crash in aggregation query with a NOT IN clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255), amount DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO tab1(id, value, amount) VALUES (1, 'test1', 100.00), (2, 'test2', 200.50), (3, 'test3', NULL);
CREATE TABLE tab2(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO tab2(col0, col1, col2) VALUES (1, 10, 5), (2, 20, NULL), (3, 30, 15);
SELECT - 89 FROM tab2 GROUP BY col1 HAVING - CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) * + - 17 + + - COUNT(*) NOT IN (MAX(44));
key_bug_features: Aggregation query with a NOT IN clause
